charged_faithfulness.central_charge: the central generator acts as i*(unit scale) on the even sector and 0 on the kernel sector
charged_faithfulness.equivariant_charge_rigidity: an equivariant lift either charges the response space through the scalar central character or degenerates to a rank-deficient map

claim_boundary.closes: PORT-CURRENT-INNER on the declared echosahedral response branch
claim_boundary.declared_source_data: the four A5-equivariant response band scales and the common odd-response sign are declared reversible-response source data, not derived from raw consensus dynamics
does_not_close: derivation of the response scales or the response space from raw OPH consensus dynamics
matter attachment, family structure, and exterior package selection
continuum Yang-Mills quantum field theory, couplings, masses, or any measured number

classification_vs_realization.coefficient_layer: the compact-Lie trichotomy classifies coefficient algebras; coefficient records can commute
classification_vs_realization.physical_layer: this receipt constructs current operators on a faithful charged response space with nonabelian closure and an inner A5 action
classification_vs_realization.separating_witness: the abelian record model matches the coefficient module yet fails the physical-current gate with CENTER_NOT_ONE_DIMENSIONAL

closure.central_u1_kernel: the adjoint action kills exactly the constant even port line

compactness.conclusion: the current algebra carries an invariant positive-definite form, hence is of compact type

frame_realization.arithmetic_field: Q(sqrt5), no floating point in any proof decision
frame_realization.coordinate_model: twelve unnormalized icosahedron vertices, cyclic permutations of (0, +/-1, +/-phi)
frame_realization.equivalence: realizations form one proper orbit; exact band coefficients verified equal for an alternative orientation-matched realization

kernel_band_schur_rigidity.conclusion: the kernel band cannot act on the even sector; the block allocation is forced

inner_action.conclusion: every implementer is exp of an element of the current image, so the induced A5 action lies in Int(g)

band_realization.frame_band: real cross-product generators hat(U d) on the even block
band_realization.kernel_band: Galois-twisted cross-product generators hat(sigma(U) d) on the kernel block
band_realization.quintet_band: i * traceless symmetric axis quadrupoles on the even block
band_realization.unit_band: i * (scale) * identity on the even block: the central u(1)

response_moduli.burnside_rank_check: sum of squared fixed-port counts over A5 equals 240 = 4 * 60

source_definedness.domain: real port fields on the twelve primitive central atoms of the certified carrier
source_definedness.inner_product: standard Hermitian pairing on the charged double-triplet response space C^3 (+) C^3
source_definedness.operators: K built from the derived oriented frame, the Galois-twisted kernel intertwiner, and the declared response scales
source_definedness.refinement_maps: the declared carrier tower maps, each intertwined by the current lift
source_definedness.response_pairing: Hilbert-Schmidt pullback -Re tr(K(f)K(f')) with exact band coefficients

uses_only: irreversible strict-descent repair ledger (excluded from currents)
